_fixture_doc: WS-7 Doc-06 ROOFING demo claim with REAL facet geometry. Property is in the TX (Dallas/DFW) priced market; carrier scope present so Doc-06 renders PRICED. The roofing line_items carry code citations + qty so the priced code-compliance supplement has rows. The roof_facets payload carries 4 facets with realistic polygon_pixels (clockwise, normalized ~0-1000, sharing ridge vertices so they tile into a coherent gable footprint) + parallel edge_types arrays so render_roof_footprint draws the REAL overhead footprint with code zones on the actual edges (eaves on the lower/outer edges, rakes on the sloped ends, ridge on the shared interior edge, a valley + a wall/step-flashing edge). This fixture EXISTS to exercise the real-footprint branch of _build_property_diagram (contrast: siding_claim_ny.json has no roof_facets and falls back to the generic house).

property.address: 412 Meadow Crest Dr, Garland, TX 75040, USA

carrier.name: Allstate
carrier_arguments: Approved field shingles only; no ice & water barrier, drip edge, or ridge vent line items.

forensic_findings.executive_summary: Wind-driven hail from the March 14, 2026 storm produced widespread granule loss and mat fracturing across all roof slopes of this single-story dwelling. The carrier approved the field shingle replacement but omitted the code-required ice & water barrier, drip edge, ridge ventilation, and valley metal that a compliant tear-off and re-roof requires.
forensic_findings.damage_summary: Functional hail bruising and granule loss on the comp-shingle roofing field; valleys and eaves show impact concentration consistent with the recorded storm direction.

code_citation.requirement: Existing roof coverings shall be removed down to the roof deck (full tear-off).
code_citation.title: Full Tear-Off Required

code_citation.requirement: Roof coverings shall be applied in accordance with the manufacturer's installation instructions, which carry the force of code.
code_citation.title: Manufacturer Install = Law

code_citation.requirement: An ice barrier shall be installed at eaves extending from the lowest edges of all roof surfaces to a point at least 24 in. inside the exterior wall line.
code_citation.title: Ice & Water Barrier

code_citation.requirement: A drip edge shall be provided at eaves and rake edges of shingle roofs.
code_citation.title: Drip Edge Required

code_citation.requirement: Enclosed attic spaces shall be provided with cross ventilation; ridge ventilation completes the balanced intake/exhaust system.
code_citation.title: Ridge Ventilation

code_citation.requirement: Valley linings shall be installed in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions before the application of shingles.
code_citation.title: Valley Lining Required
